# Oct 10 2002 at 3:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776031056
30 posts
Is it just me, or is the whole point of playing this game to have some fun? It's really not cool to down other people just for showing a little imagination, and a desire to kid around and have a good time. EQ is not a job, or a way of life, it's a game. Get the connection? Game=Fun!! Or at least it should. So get a clue, get a life, and if that's your attitude about people trying to have a little fun, then you should probably get a new hobby.

Uhh... The history of the Titanic isn't science fiction, dumb-***.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 10 2002 at 12:49 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) u dumbass, at least when ur makin this **** up about the boat do it right. If he were to summon the titanic it says "A Boat has raised a steel servant!". u loser, the Titanic is made out of titanium not steel. lol, moron.
RE: Damn
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2002 at 12:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776410526
Sage
280 posts
If you are referring to the Titanic that sunk in the 1912 ( give or take a few years ), you are mistaken. The Titanic was crafted from substandard steel ( ie steel that had to high a carbon content, making it brittle like cast iron in low temperatures), which in the cold waters caused brittle fracture of the hull when it struck an iceberg. The only ships that had hulls made from titanium are Russian submarines ( and possible very deep sea diving submersibles that go in places like the Marianna's trench off the coast of Guam )because titanium is a very common element in Russia/former USSR.

55 Ogre Luminary on Luclin server--Chaotic Winds--Baron Aggrok

▲ Page top
Boats are Evil!
QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2002 at 12:11 AM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The other day, somebody somehow pulled the boat onland and charmed it. Eventually, the charm wore off and it started to fight the guy (don't ask). It double attacked for around 540 and needless to say, the guy who charmed died quite quickly.

Meanwhile, I was hitting bats and snakes with my Club* and my Tunic* while I noticed some people starting to shout things like "what's a boat doing on land" and "wtf, a boat just killed me". Of course, I smiled when I heard their dying complaints: boats didn't aggro on people. I took on the next goblin whelp...

At this time, all of GFay and LFay and Freeport and even HK heard about this "bug". Level 40+'s came from around the area to take on the boat. People started to create parties as the boat neared me...

Here's my fight with the whelp:

A Goblin Whelp says, 'ugly creature at my feet. Me thinks you'd be good to eat'
You slash Goblin Whelp for 9 points of damage
A Goblin Whelp slashes you for 4 points of damage
A Goblin Whelp bashes you for 2 points of damage
You are stunned!
A Goblin Whelp slashes you for 5 points of damage
You are unstunned!
You slash Goblin Whelp for 11 points of damage
You have slain a goblin whelp!
You have gained Experience!
A Boat hits you for 432 points of damage
You have been slain by a boat!
Returning to home point...
LOADING PLEASE WAIT...

Finally, the groups of 40+'s started to attack the boat. Soon, it was down to 10% hp, when all of a sudden:
A boat maker begins to cast a spell
A boat has been fixed for 2538 points of damage
A boat maker begins to cast a spell
A boat has been fixed for 2583 points of damage
A boat maker begins to cast a spell
A boat has been fixed for 2584 points of damage...

The process repeated for a while and the boat maker was quite a threat, especially when he started to sink stuff for 582 points of damage.

Finally, he was oom, and we took him out and the boat afterwards. The boat dropped a cracked helm (no drop, lore) and the boat maker dropped a crude hammer of nauticality (43d, 23 delay, 2hb, All Races All Classes +30 to all saves +10 STR +10 AGI +10 STA +20 WIS +20 INT +10 DEX).

All in all, it was fun to watch the futile attempts of the guards and other pcs to destroy the boat when the boatmaker was around. Reading the posts above, I can confirm that the boat maker can summon a titanic, which he tried to cast once, but we defeated him first.
▲ Page top
RE: Boats are Evil!
QuoteReply
# Jan 26 2003 at 1:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784332903
View User Forum
86 posts
"I was hitting bats and snakes with my Club*"

"You slash Goblin Whelp for 9 points of damage"

Duh... did anyone figure this out? Club = 1hb = crush, not slash. Funny story, I'll admit, but I can't believe all you EQ veterans never noticed that...

/laugh say points at %t and laughs.

Nerzuhl Soulclaimer
Teir'Dal Necromancer of the 35th Season
Terris-Thule

/target A Boat
/attack
You try to hit A Boat but miss!
A Boat hits YOU for 1 point of damage.
A Boat hits YOU for 1 point of damage.
A Boat hits YOU for 1 point of damage.
A Boat hits YOU for 1 point of damage.
You try to hit A Boat but miss!
A Boat hits YOU for 1 point of damage.
A Boat hits YOU for 1 point of damage.
A Boat hits YOU for 1 point of damage.
A Boat hits YOU for 1 point of damage.
You try to hit A Boat but miss!
A Boat begins to cast a spell.
You try to hit A Boat but miss!
A Boat has raised a steel servant!
A Titanic hits you for 10 points of damage.
A Titanic hits you for 10 points of damage.
A Titanic hits you for 10 points of damage.
A Titanic hits you for 10 points of damage.
A Boat hits YOU for 1 point of damage.
A Boat hits YOU for 1 point of damage.
A Boat hits YOU for 1 point of damage.
A Boat hits YOU for 1 point of damage.
You try to hit A Boat but miss!
You tell the group 'ADD
A Titanic hits you for 10 points of damage.
A Titanic hits you for 10 points of damage.
A Titanic hits you for 10 points of damage.
A Titanic hits you for 10 points of damage.
A Boat hits YOU for 1 point of damage.
A Boat hits YOU for 1 point of damage.
A Boat hits YOU for 1 point of damage.
A Boat hits YOU for 1 point of damage.
You try to hit A Boat but miss!
Moofoo tells the group 'RUN TO ZONE!!
A Boat begins to cast a spell
You are hit by non-melee for 32000 points of damage.
You have been slain by A Boat!
LOADING PLEASE WAIT...
You have entered n00b v1ll4g3
You tell the group 'that sucked

He quads for 1 point of damage but summons an uber mob that basically takes up the whole zone and quads for 10 damage. If you run he DT's you :(
